creator: freebsd@marino.st
text:
master site seems to have been reset.
Distfile not fetchable
may affect all cursor-chameleon-* ports

===>  Giving up on fetching files: Chameleon-DarkSkyBlue-0.5.tar.bz2 
Make sure the Makefile and distinfo file (/usr/dports/x11-themes/cursor-chameleon-darkskyblue/distinfo)
are up to date.  If you are absolutely sure you want to override this
check, type "make NO_CHECKSUM=yes [other args]".
